evidence_refs: Name/code similarity: "TemplatePopup" matches "Contextual object template popup (seed) — Phase, Action, and Task cards should support a contextual template popup so users can later load object-relevant templates without a full template database in MVP. — Holding/clicking an object opens a contextual popup loading templates relevant to that object type, supporting categories, search, loading state, empty state, and object-aware results. Future apply: phase templates add/merge actions+tasks; action templates add/merge tasks; task templates fill fields/specs/subtasks. Template application must not blindly overwrite without review." (score: 0.85)
